name: All American Chicken and Vegetable Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 Reynolds Hot Bag Foil Bag, large size
3 ears fresh corn on the cob, halved
1/2 pound fresh green beans, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill to medium-high or oven to 450°F.
2. Open the foil bag. Combine water and flour in a small bowl.
3. Add the mixture to the foil bag.
4. In another small bowl, combine grated parmesan cheese with garlic salt, paprika, and pepper (if using).
5. Sprinkle half of this seasoning over the chicken pieces.
6. Place the seasoned chicken evenly on top of the flour mixture in the foil bag.
7. Combine the remaining vegetables with the rest of the seasonings.
8. Arrange the vegetables on top of the chicken.
9. Seal the open end of the foil bag by doubling it back and folding securely.
10. Place the foil bag in a 1-inch deep pan.
11. Cook:
- If grilling, slide the foil bag onto the grill and cook for 30-35 minutes, covered.
- If baking, place the foil bag in the oven supporting pan and bake for 55-60 minutes.
12. Using oven mitts, carefully cut open the foil bag with a sharp knife.
13. Fold back the top of the foil bag to allow steam to escape before serving.
